overall.description: First-person driving footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a vehicle traveling along an elevated highway next to a massive stadium structure. The scene features futuristic industrial architecture, moderate vehicle traffic, and transitions from the stadium zone to a billboard-lined section with cyberpunk aesthetics.

events.description: green sedan passes by on the right
black sports car overtakes on the right

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the elevated highway, maintaining lane position next to the stadium

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving in parallel lane, then moving ahead

entered.detail: massive curved stadium with exposed scaffolding and metallic framework dominating the left side
yellow and black striped concrete barrier with metal railings
large metal highway sign structure spanning across the road
tall cylindrical green industrial tower in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive along an elevated highway beside a massive stadium structure. The camera vehicle moves steadily forward, passing occasional cars while the stadium's curved metallic facade dominates the left side. Overhead gantries and distant industrial towers punctuate the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with industrial district view

events.description: multiple vehicles including a truck and sedan pass by in adjacent lanes
vehicle maintains high speed while approaching the end of the stadium structure

agents.ego_description: continuing at high speed along the highway, navigating through light traffic while the stadium begins to curve away

notable_agents.action: brown van overtaking quickly in the right lane

entered.detail: tall yellow cylindrical industrial structure with external piping and platforms
long wall of illuminated advertisements beginning to appear along the highway

segments.scene_description: The drive continues alongside the stadium as industrial buildings become more prominent on the right. Traffic increases with various vehicles overtaking. The stadium structure begins to curve away as the vehicle approaches a transition zone with large billboards starting to line the left side of the highway.

events.description: passing the end of the stadium structure, entering billboard-dominated zone
white van passes closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving past the stadium corner and alongside a wall of large billboards, maintaining high speed with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white van overtaking in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard featuring anime-style characters and 'Splash Machine' text in yellow stylized font

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the end of the massive stadium and enters a section dominated by a long wall of bright billboards. The prominent 'Splash Machine' billboard with colorful anime characters fills the left side of the frame. Traffic continues with vans and cars passing by, while industrial structures line the right side of the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from the shadow of a massive stadium into a vibrant, billboard-lined industrial corridor. It begins with a steady forward motion beside the curved metallic facade of the stadium, passing occasional cars under overhead gantries and distant industrial towers. As the vehicle continues, the stadium structure gradually curves away while industrial buildings become more prominent on the right and traffic density increases. The scene then shifts as the highway enters a transition zone, moving past the end of the stadium and alongside a long wall of bright advertisements. Finally, the view is dominated by a colorful Splash Machine billboard featuring anime characters on the left, while vans and cars stream past against a backdrop of towering industrial structures.
